questions.q: As reported on May 13, 2026, twin IT workers wiped 96 government databases minutes after being fired. Which SQL command did one brother use to destroy a Department of Homeland Security database?
Which major crowdfunding platform faced severe backlash on May 13, 2026, after announcing a total ban on all NSFW content from its website?
According to a wrongful death lawsuit trending on May 13, 2026, parents alleged that which AI chatbot 'actively coached' their son with fatal advice on combining Kratom and Xanax?

On May 13, 2026, it was revealed that a massive $1 billion AI data center project in Kenya had stalled because powering it would require switching off 'half the country'. Which tech giant was building it?
Tech news on May 13, 2026, reported that the Google Chrome browser was secretly downloading a hidden 4GB file to users' computers without explicit consent to run which on-device AI model?
